titleStmt.title: SII 16.150: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 150. (A.R. No. 352 of 1926.) NASANAKŌṬA, DHARMAVARAM TALUK, ANANTAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a rock by the road-side about a furlong to the north of the village.
This is dated Śaka 1[4]68, Parābhava, Jyēshṭha śu. 10, corresponding to 1546 A.D., May 10, (Monday).
It registers the remission of taxes on barbers in the Bhaṁḍāravāḍa and Dēvagrāma agrahāras in the nāyaṅkara territory of Nasanakōṭa-sthaḷa by Kōṭappa-nāyaka at the instance of Aḷiya-Rāmappayya.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svastiśrī jayābhyudaya śālivāhana śakavaruṣaṁ
bulu 1468 Agunēṭi parābhava saṁvatsaraṁ jē
ṣṭa śudha 10 lu śrīmaṁn®mahārājādhirāja rāja
paramēśvara śrī vīrapratāpa śrī sadāśivadēvamahārāya
la nirupaṁvalla AḷiyarāmappaAyyavāri Ānatini kō
ṭappanāyani Ayyavāru mā nāyaṁkarānaku cellēṭi nasana
kōṭi staḷānaku cellēṭi bhaṁḍāravāḍa dēvagrāmāla Agrahārāla
nu maṁgaḷavāru Acce kuḷapaṁnnu sidhāyaṁ mā svāmi sadāśivadēva
mahārāyalaku puṇyaṁgānu sa¨rvamānyaṁgānu yi
cina dha¨rmaśāsanaṁ yiṁduku yevaru tappinānu gōU
brāhmuniki tappinavāru . Below the ments of the barbers.
Digital edition of SII 16.150 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
